mapper.select: SELECT S.STOCK_ID, S.ITEM_ID, I.ITEM_NAME, I.ITEM_CODE, I.MIN_QTY, S.CURRENT_QTY, CASE WHEN S.CURRENT_QTY < I.MIN_QTY THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS LOW_STOCK, TO_CHAR(S.UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATED_AT FROM STOCK S JOIN ITEM I ON S.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID WHERE S.ITEM_ID = #{itemId}

SELECT S.STOCK_ID, S.ITEM_ID, I.ITEM_NAME, I.ITEM_CODE, I.MIN_QTY, S.CURRENT_QTY, CASE WHEN S.CURRENT_QTY < I.MIN_QTY THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS LOW_STOCK, TO_CHAR(S.UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATED_AT FROM STOCK S JOIN ITEM I ON S.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID WHERE I.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY LOW_STOCK DESC, I.ITEM_ID ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE STOCK SET CURRENT_QTY = CURRENT_QTY + #{qty}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE ITEM_ID = #{itemId}
UPDATE STOCK SET CURRENT_QTY = CURRENT_QTY - #{qty}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE ITEM_ID = #{itemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCK_HISTORY ( HISTORY_ID, ITEM_ID, HISTORY_TYPE, QTY, REASON, CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_HISTORY.NEXTVAL, #{itemId}, #{historyType}, #{qty}, #{reason}, #{createdBy}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT H.HISTORY_ID, H.ITEM_ID, I.ITEM_NAME, H.HISTORY_TYPE, H.QTY, H.REASON, H.CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(H.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATED_AT FROM STOCK_HISTORY H JOIN ITEM I ON H.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID WHERE H.ITEM_ID = #{itemId} ORDER BY H.CREATED_AT DESC
